data.title: Bitcoin analysis: dollar correlation, state reserves, and 2025 projections
data.description:
Bitcoin navigates macro shifts: USD weakness, state reserve talks, and post-halving dynamics drive bullish momentum into 2025 and beyond. The article Bitcoin analysis: dollar correlation, state reserves, and 2025 projections was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/focus/background/bitcoin-analysis-dollar-correlation-state-reserves-and-2025-projections/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Bitcoin+analysis%3A+dollar+correlation%2C+state+reserves%2C+and+2025+projections

data.title: HTX DAO will disclose Q1 destruction data and the latest progress of the ecosystem in a live broadcast today
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, HTX DAO will hold a live broadcast on the theme of "HTX DAO 2025 Q1 Destruction Results Disclosure & Development Progress" at 19:30 today. At that time, HTX DAO core builders Huobi HTX Liuye, Helium, Huobi HTX Investment Research Team, HTX DAO Honorary Committee Member Maomao Sister, and Huobi HTX Contract Ambassador Big Cousin will be invited to attend and jointly interpret HTX DAO's first quarter destruction data, review the project construction results, and discuss in depth issues such as DAO governance and future development of the ecosystem. This event will be held simultaneously through Huobi Live and Huobi HTX Twitter Space, and there will be massive airdrops.

data.title: GSR deposited 4 million WCT to Binance 6 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, GSR recharged 4 million WCT (about 1.61 million US dollars) to Binance 6 hours ago. Today, 7 million WCT (about 3.46 million US dollars) has been deposited in Binance, and it is suspected to be a market maker of WCT.

data.title: deBridge governance token DBR airdrop is now open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the deBridge governance token DBR airdrop is now open for collection. Users who participate in the LFG launch and meet the airdrop conditions can collect DBR tokens on the deBridge Foundation official website. The deadline for airdrop collection is May 17th 16:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Rising Bullish Bets on Asian Currencies Amid Dollar Pressure
data.description: According to Odaily, a Reuters survey of analysts indicates an increase in bullish bets on several emerging Asian currencies due to ongoing pressure on the U.S. dollar. The survey, which included eight analysts, reveals growing optimism among traders towards the Singapore dollar, Thai baht, and Indian rupee, while long positions on the Philippine peso have reached their highest since early October. Analysts from HSBC Holdings noted that the 'silver lining' for all Asian currencies is the challenges faced by the dollar itself. The low position of the dollar index helps mitigate the upward risk of the dollar against Asian currencies.

data.title: Reuters poll: Weaker dollar makes investors slightly more bullish on some Asian currencies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A Reuters survey of analysts showed that as the US dollar continued to be under pressure, bullish bets on some emerging Asian currencies rose, but bearish positions on the Indonesian rupiah increased. The survey of eight analysts showed that traders became optimistic about the Singapore dollar, Thai baht and Indian rupee, and increased long positions in the Philippine peso to the highest level since early October. "The 'silver lining' for all Asian currencies is that the US dollar itself is facing challenges." Analysts at HSBC Holdings wrote, "The low level of the US dollar index will help curb the upside risk of the US dollar against Asian currencies." (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Liquidity Matching Program Opens Application for Verification Letter
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Liquidity Matching Project now provides a certification letter application service for standard and advanced participants. The certification letter can serve as an official proof of the user's participation in the project and maintaining trading volume on Binance. Applicants must meet the corresponding level requirements and abide by the platform terms. Users can submit applications by contacting their account manager or sending an email to VIP@binance.com. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Huang Renxun: China is a very important market for NVIDIA, and we hope to continue to cooperate in the future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Today, China Council for the Promotion of International Trade President Ren Hongbin held talks with Nvidia CEO Huang Renxun in Beijing. This is Huang Renxun's first visit to Beijing in three months. Huang Renxun said in the talks that China is a very important market for Nvidia and hopes to continue to cooperate with China in the future. (CCTV News)

data.title: YakiHonne Smart Widgets opens a new social portal for DA(gentic)O
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, YakiHonne will release programmable Smart Widgets to provide lightweight social and payment interfaces for distributed Agentic organizations (DA(gentic)O), enabling seamless collaboration, transactions and governance of intelligent agents (Agentic AI). Smart Widgets supports Agentic Mini Apps, covering scenarios such as on-chain voting, social interaction, and offline consumption, connecting the virtual and real worlds, and activating decentralized productivity.
DA(gentic)O integrates distributed architecture, autonomous intelligence and organized operations, surpasses the governance bottleneck of traditional DAO, and realizes dynamic collaboration through open protocols. Smart Widgets provides embedded social flow, instant payment, on-chain identity binding and other functions to lower the development threshold and promote the formation of agent economy. Application scenarios mainly include intelligent governance, decentralized social ecology and consumer ecology.
YakiHonne not only creates a decentralized social payment platform, but also builds an "Agentic social operating system" to drive the future of multi-agent collaboration, social economy and distributed development ecology.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index Rises Slightly
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has increased to 31 today, up from 30 yesterday. Despite this slight rise, the market remains in a state of 'fear.'
